creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
While the update to newer HAL versions fixes the --direct issue, the matching for the mouse port is still wrong on FreeBSD, and should read

<match key="freebsd.driver" string="psm">

instead of <match key="input.originating_device" contains="i8042_AUX_port">

The attached patch fixes the issue.

Also, the driver has been updated to 12.6.10; updating the Makefile is sufficient to update the port to the latest version.


Stefan

-- 
Stefan Bethke <stb@lassitu.de>   Fon +49 151 14070811
